compiled_state.title: EV-3c: reconciler/LLM tunable renames + id-guard value-flip
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
Reconciler + LLM tunable renames and the id-guard value-flip (slice of EV-3 / 15f6). These are advanced/rarely-set knobs read via raw env in their own subsystems (custom env names, not REBAR_<SECTION>_<KEY>); rename for clarity with old-name aliases + warnings.

## Scope / Deliverables
- REBAR_ACLI_TIMEOUT -> REBAR_JIRA_CLI_TIMEOUT (acli_subprocess.py).
- REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_RETRY_BUDGET -> REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_MAX_RETRIES (_advisory_lock.py).
- RECONCILER_ABSENT_GET_BUDGET -> REBAR_RECONCILER_DELETION_PROBE_LIMIT (outbound_differ.py).
- REBAR_LLM_MAX_ITERS -> REBAR_LLM_MAX_STEPS (llm/config.py, llm/runner.py) with a clearer doc.
- REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE -> REBAR_UNSAFE_ID_GUARD_BYPASS (rebar_id_audit.py): boolean true/false default false; value map raise->false, warn->true; alias old env + legacy config key rebar_id_guard_mode; emit a LOUD warning every sync while bypass is engaged.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Each renamed with old-name alias + deprecation warning; defaults unchanged
- [ ] id-guard value-flip (raise/warn -> false/true) with alias mapping + loud per-sync warning when bypass true
- [ ] Tests for each rename/alias + the value-flip; full non-integration suite green

comments.body: DONE (config-loop, commit 8c2c95b1). Reader-level env renames (prefer new name, fall back to old with deprecation warning) for the advanced reconciler/llm raw-env knobs. (1) REBAR_ACLI_TIMEOUT->REBAR_JIRA_CLI_TIMEOUT. (2) REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_RETRY_BUDGET->REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_MAX_RETRIES — also fixed a pre-existing bug where the WS1 alias read the same var name twice (no-op). (3) RECONCILER_ABSENT_GET_BUDGET->REBAR_RECONCILER_DELETION_PROBE_LIMIT. (4) REBAR_LLM_MAX_ITERS->REBAR_LLM_MAX_STEPS (+ clearer doc + runner message). (5) REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE->REBAR_UNSAFE_ID_GUARD_BYPASS with the value-flip: raise->false (guard active), warn->true (bypass); new _resolve_id_guard_bypass (canonical env > deprecated REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE env > legacy config rebar_id_guard_mode > default False fail-CLOSED); bypass emits a LOUD per-violation warning. ACs met: each renamed + old-name aliased with warning; defaults unchanged; id-guard value-flip with alias mapping + loud warning. SECURITY verified by subagent review: default fail-closed, garbage canonical bypass->False (safe), NO fail-open regression. 16 new tests (canonical/alias/canonical-wins each; id-guard default-active/bool/env+config value-flip; llm alias). Existing reconciler/llm suites green via aliases (123 affected). Full offline suite green: 1966 passed. ruff check + format clean. Verify gate untouched. Last EV-3 sub-ticket -> unblocks 15f6.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
